entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop produced extensively in West and Central Africa.

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: A region accounting for over 70% of African groundnut production.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The primary abiotic production constraint for groundnut in the region.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut accessions and varieties to maintain productivity under drought stress.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International center collaborating with national programs to develop improved groundnut varieties.

entities.name: NATIONAL BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Local agricultural programs working with ICRISAT to develop and release varieties.

entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUMES PROJECT
entities.description: A project initiated in 2007 to strengthen regional breeding programs.

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A subset of germplasm used to identify drought-resistant accessions.

entities.name: CROSSING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Breeding methods using identified accessions as parents to develop new lines.

entities.name: FARMER PARTICIPATORY VARIETY SELECTION
entities.description: A method involving farmers to accelerate the release and adoption of varieties.

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country where improved groundnut varieties were released.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country where improved groundnut varieties were released.

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country where improved groundnut varieties were released.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: A country where improved groundnut varieties were released.

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A country where improved groundnut varieties were released.

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A trait of released varieties showing a yield advantage of more than 20%.

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Biotic constraints that released groundnut varieties are resistant or tolerant to.

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The objective of improving breeding efficiency and progress.

entities.name: PRODUCT PIPELINES
entities.description: A method of designing breeding goals based on traits of interest.

entities.name: GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A method of growing 2 to 3 generations per year to speed up breeding.

entities.name: MODERN GENOMIC TOOLS
entities.description: Advanced tools integrated into breeding to increase efficiency.

entities.name: BMS
entities.description: A system for digitizing data collection, analysis, management, and sharing.

relationships.description: used for variety release and adoption
